emails.subject: XUMA NDA
emails.body: XUMA NDA I'm having our messengers walk over two copies of the NDA initialled by Leslie Hansen. If you could have one of your officers, VP or above sign them, and then when fully executed by the Company, return the original to me. Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: XUMA NDA
emails.body: Re: XUMA NDA Thanks, Tana. Laura PS I passed your name on to Gillian Johnson of Enron Credit.com for help with executing NDAs and such. Tana Jones@ECT 10/24/00 02:04 PM
